title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Inorbit Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
